technical_debt_gaps.issue: Persistent Redirect Errors (2 URLs) — Carry-over from Feb 20
technical_debt_gaps.description: /case-studies and /website-translation still showing 'Redirect error' in GSC URL Inspection despite being flagged in Feb 20 audit. Either the generate-sitemap.js trailing-slash fix was never deployed, or there are server-side redirect issues.
technical_debt_gaps.action: 1) Check live sitemap.xml for correct trailing-slash URLs. 2) curl-test /case-studies/ and /website-translation/ for 200 OK. 3) If fix exists but wasn't deployed, trigger build+deploy.

technical_debt_gaps.description: Only homepage and /blog/ are indexed after 33 days. However, user confirms sitemap only started indexing last week due to technical issues, and GSC shows explosive query growth (2→27). Trajectory is POSITIVE.
technical_debt_gaps.action: Continue monitoring. Re-submit sitemap if not already done post-fix. No premature interventions.

technical_debt_gaps.description: Despite _headers noindex commit (639edc2 on Feb 20), 79 users still appear on *.pages.dev hostnames in GA4. May indicate headers not being served correctly.
technical_debt_gaps.action: Verify X-Robots-Tag: noindex header on launchedin10website.pages.dev, launchedin10-final.pages.dev, launchedin10-app.pages.dev.

technical_debt_gaps.issue: Stale lastmod Dates (4 blog posts pre-date go-live)
technical_debt_gaps.description: 4 blog posts in sitemap have lastmod of 2026-01-01 or 2026-01-03, but site went live Feb 1. May reduce crawl priority signals.
technical_debt_gaps.action: Audit generate-sitemap.js date generation logic. Ensure dates reflect actual publish/update timestamps from Supabase.

content_pipeline_assessment.status: SATURATED — 61 pending entries across 5 category silos (Website Design, Business Growth, SEO Fundamentals, Industry Spotlights, Industry Insights). No new content gaps to ingest.
content_pipeline_assessment.recommendation: Focus on indexing acceleration. Content factory is ahead of Google's crawl capacity for this domain age.

emerging_clusters.assessment: Near-Featured-Snippet. Strongest signal. Organic ranking without any backlinks.
Industry spotlight content resonating. Page-2 UK positions.
Commercial intent. Bottom of page 1 on long-tail variant.

keyword_trajectory.trajectory_assessment: EXPLOSIVE GROWTH — Queries 2→4→27 across 3 audit cycles. Validates topical authority strategy.

note: Zero zombie targets. All content < 2 months old. 6-month incubation grace period strictly enforced. Next audit should check if indexed pages > 10 — if not, escalate to Position 1 Recovery Protocol.
